name: Nomad Credit
description_short: Nomad Credit is an online education loan marketplace connecting students pursuing global degrees with 20+ international and domestic lenders offering rates from 2.79%.
description_long:
Nomad Credit is an online education lending platform designed specifically for students financing degrees abroad and in India. Founded to serve 'global nomads,' the company has processed over ₹10 billion in loans across 9+ countries. The platform operates as a marketplace aggregator rather than a direct lender, partnering with established financial institutions including Earnest, Sallie Mae, Avanse, Credila, ICICI Bank, Incred, Auxilo, MPower Financing, and Prodigy Finance.

Nomad Credit's core offering is a comparison and application platform for education loans. Students answer eligibility questions, receive personalized recommendations from available lenders, and submit a single application that can be reviewed by multiple providers. Loan amounts range from USD 100K-220K (international) to INR 3 crore (domestic), with interest rates starting at 2.79% for Earnest and varying by lender. The platform also offers a scholarship finder tool and free Visa consultation services post-application. Moratorium periods (grace periods) extend from course duration plus 6-12 months depending on the lender.

Nomad Credit differentiates itself through several features: a no-collateral option with US cosigner (Earnest, Sallie Mae), a no-cosigner path through some lenders (MPower, Prodigy), zero processing fees from select lenders, and what they describe as 'spam-free' personalized guidance from experts. The platform emphasizes transparency, offering free eligibility checks and visible loan tracking. They highlight faster and clearer processes than competitors, with guided support through the entire application and disbursement workflow.

A key limitation is that Nomad Credit is explicitly an education loan platform, not a general personal loan lender. It serves students financing higher education degrees (MBA, professional courses) internationally or domestically, not consumers seeking traditional personal loans for consolidation, purchases, or emergencies. While categorized as 'personal-loans,' this product is highly specialized for a specific use case. Rates are competitive but require strong academic credentials and often a cosigner, limiting accessibility for average credit profiles. Many lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months.
address: Millennium Centre, 33 W Ontario St Suite 18D, Chicago, IL 60654

company_info.headquarters: Millennium Centre, 33 W Ontario St Suite 18D, Chicago, IL 60654

pros: Interest rates starting at 2.79% with Earnest (among lowest available for education loans)
20+ lender options on single platform enabling genuine comparison shopping
Zero processing fees available through multiple lenders (Earnest, Sallie Mae)
No-cosigner options available through MPower Financing and Prodigy Finance
Free Visa consultation services and scholarship finder tool included
Completely online process with no appointments required
Flexible tenure options up to 15-20 years across lender network
Moratorium periods (grace periods) extending 6-12 months beyond course completion
cons: Exclusively for education loans—not suitable for personal, medical, home improvement, or debt consolidation needs
Domestic Indian loans require collateral or carry higher interest rates (9-11%+) with processing fees of 0.5-1%
International loans typically require US cosigner for most lenders (except MPower/Prodigy), limiting accessibility
Loan amounts capped at INR 3 crore domestic or USD 220K international—not suitable for larger funding needs
Platform acts as aggregator only; actual underwriting, approval, and customer service depend on underlying lenders' quality
best_for: Indian students pursuing MBA or professional degrees at US/international universities
Students seeking education loans with competitive rates and multiple lender options
Borrowers with strong academic credentials and ability to secure US cosigner
Those comparing education loan products across 9+ major lenders without submitting multiple separate applications
diagnosis: Nomad Credit is best for Indian students financing higher education degrees internationally or domestically who want to compare education loans from multiple lenders simultaneously. The critical caveat is that this is exclusively an education lending platform—it cannot serve consumers seeking personal loans for consolidation, emergency funds, medical bills, or other non-educational purposes.
services: Education loan eligibility checker and instant recommendations
Consolidated application platform for 20+ international and domestic lenders
Loan comparison across lenders with transparent terms and processing fees
Online application submission with guided support
Loan sanction tracking and status updates
Loan disbursement coordination (direct to account or school)
Flexible repayment options and ongoing repayment support
meta_description: Online education loan marketplace connecting students with 20+ international and domestic lenders offering rates from 2.79%.
